tasks.subject: Task 0: Initialize Astro project and repo
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Astro 5 project scaffolded in `~/Documents/Personal/Portfolio`, configured for static output, committed to git.

**Files:**
- Create: `~/Documents/Personal/Portfolio/` (entire scaffold)
- Create: `astro.config.mjs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npm run build` completes with no errors
- [ ] `dist/index.html` exists after build
- [ ] Git repo initialized with initial commit

**Verify:** `npm run build && ls dist/index.html`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["astro.config.mjs", "package.json", "tsconfig.json", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && ls dist/index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build completes with no errors", "dist/index.html exists after build", "Git repo initialized with initial commit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Base layout and global styles
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dark/minimal CSS theme and `Base.astro` layout shell with nav and footer.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/styles/global.css`
- Create: `src/layouts/Base.astro`

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/styles/global.css", "src/layouts/Base.astro"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build succeeds", "Nav shows wordmark and links", "Dark background applied"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Homepage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hub homepage with hero and three hub cards.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/pages/index.astro`

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/pages/index.astro"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Hero shows name/tagline/bio", "Three hub cards link to /tools /blog /about", "Cards stack on mobile"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Tools page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `/tools` page with Vigilant card.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/pages/tools.astro`

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/pages/tools.astro"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Tools page renders with Vigilant card", "Live link opens in new tab", "Tech tags displayed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Blog (Content Collections + placeholder + post route)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Content Collections wired up, `/blog` placeholder, `/blog/[id]` post route.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/content.config.ts`
- Create: `src/content/blog/.gitkeep`
- Create: `src/pages/blog/index.astro`
- Create: `src/pages/blog/[id].astro`

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/content.config.ts", "src/content/blog/.gitkeep", "src/pages/blog/index.astro", "src/pages/blog/[id].astro"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Build succeeds with empty collection", "/blog shows placeholder", "Post route renders markdown"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: About page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `/about` page with bio and links.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/pages/about.astro`

**Verify:** `npm run build && ls dist/about/index.html`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/pages/about.astro"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && ls dist/about/index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["About page renders with bio", "GitHub and Vigilant links present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Deploy infrastructure
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Portfolio Docker stack on VPS, deploy.sh, thunderborn.conf vhost in vigilant-vps nginx.

**Files:**
- Create: `docker-compose.yml`, `nginx.conf`, `deploy.sh` (Portfolio repo)
- Create: `nginx/thunderborn.conf` (vigilant-vps repo)
- Modify: `docker-compose.yml` (vigilant-vps repo)

**Verify:** `curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://thunderborn.dev`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docker-compose.yml", "nginx.conf", "deploy.sh", "nginx/thunderborn.conf"], "verifyCommand": "curl -s -o /dev/null -w \"%{http_code}\" https://thunderborn.dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Portfolio container running on web network", "nginx -t passes", "thunderborn.dev returns 200"]}
```
